Nested Loop Left Join  (cost=0.01..2.16 rows=1 width=4) (actual time=2.267..2.270 rows=1.00 loops=1)
  Output: x.extversion
  Inner Unique: true
  Buffers: shared hit=1
  ->  Function Scan on pg_catalog.pg_available_extensions e  (cost=0.01..1.11 rows=1 width=64) (actual time=2.249..2.252 rows=1.00 loops=1)
        Output: e.name, e.default_version, e.comment
        Function Call: pg_available_extensions()
        Filter: (e.name = 'fasttrun'::name)
        Rows Removed by Filter: 61
  ->  Seq Scan on pg_catalog.pg_extension x  (cost=0.00..1.04 rows=1 width=68) (actual time=0.015..0.016 rows=1.00 loops=1)
        Output: x.oid, x.extname, x.extowner, x.extnamespace, x.extrelocatable, x.extversion, x.extconfig, x.extcondition
        Filter: (x.extname = 'fasttrun'::name)
        Rows Removed by Filter: 2
        Buffers: shared hit=1
Query Identifier: -79929494436939192

Execution Time: 2.290 ms
